assertions.title: CCXT network IDs normalized to canonical platform IDs

steps.expected: Chain catalog sync resolves exchange network IDs through canonical platform resolution before upsert
steps.observed: `syncChainCatalogFromExchanges` calls `resolveCanonicalPlatform(...)` for each network and deletes legacy IDs before canonical upsert.

steps.action: Run `bun run vitest run tests/platform-id.test.ts tests/catalog.test.ts tests/initial-sync.test.ts`
steps.expected: A targeted test confirms ETH/BSC/SOL inputs create `ethereum`, `binance-smart-chain`, and `solana` rows without legacy alias rows
steps.observed: `tests/initial-sync.test.ts` passed case `discovers and upserts chain catalogs from exchange network metadata`, logging `chainsDiscovered=3` and asserting canonical rows exist while `eth`/`bsc` do not.

assertions.title: Chain identifier takes precedence over alias

steps.expected: Chain identifier mapping is checked before alias normalization
steps.observed: `resolveCanonicalPlatform` checks `PLATFORM_ID_BY_CHAIN_IDENTIFIER` before alias and fallback normalization.
`tests/platform-id.test.ts` passed case `gives chain identifier precedence over the raw alias value`.

assertions.title: Alias resolution covers all documented identifiers

steps.expected: Documented aliases are present and normalize to canonical IDs
steps.observed: Alias map includes documented identifiers such as `eth`, `erc20`, `bsc`, `bnbsmartchain`, `bep20`, `sol`, `btc`, `trx`, and `trc20` plus expanded chain aliases.

steps.expected: Parameterized alias coverage test passes for all documented identifiers
steps.observed: `tests/platform-id.test.ts` passed case `resolves all documented aliases to their canonical ids`.

steps.action: Inspect `src/modules/catalog.ts` contract lookup wiring and tests
steps.expected: Contract lookup resolves canonical/shortname candidates for alias inputs
steps.observed: `getCoinByContract` is exercised by tests that query the same Ethereum contract through `eth`, `ethereum`, and `erc20`.

steps.expected: All alias forms return the same coin
steps.observed: `tests/catalog.test.ts` passed case `resolves contract addresses through canonical platform aliases`, and all three lookups returned `usd-coin`.

steps.expected: When the same canonical platform is discovered multiple times, a non-null chain identifier wins over null
steps.observed: Merge logic updates `existing.chainIdentifier` when the current value is null and a later exchange provides a non-null chain identifier.

steps.expected: Integration test confirms ethereum row ends with chain identifier 1 when exchanges report null then 1
steps.observed: `tests/initial-sync.test.ts` passed case `prefers non-null chain identifiers when exchanges disagree on the same canonical network`, asserting `ethereum.chainIdentifier === 1`.

assertions.title: Unknown networks normalize to slug form

steps.expected: Unknown network IDs normalize to deterministic lowercase hyphenated slugs
steps.observed: `normalizePlatformId` lowercases and hyphenates separators; unresolved platform IDs fall back to that slug with heuristic confidence.

steps.expected: Unit test confirms unknown network examples normalize as expected
steps.observed: `tests/platform-id.test.ts` passed case `normalizes known and unknown platforms into deterministic slugs`, including `Polygon_POS -> polygon-pos` and `Made Up Chain -> made-up-chain`.

summary: Tested 6 assigned repository-validation assertions. All 6 passed via targeted Vitest coverage plus typecheck confirmation.
